description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the saraedum/android-sdk Docker image for all jobs and caches Gradle files in /root/.gradle/caches/. Define four stages: check, build, lint, and test, and set CI_FLAVOURS to AlphaWikipediaDebug AlphaWikivoyageDebug AlphaWikipediaRelease AlphaWikivoyageRelease. In the check stage add a checkstyle job that runs ./gradlew checkstyle and always uploads app/build/outputs/ and app/build/reports/ as artifacts. In the build stage add a buildAlpha job that iterates over ${CI_FLAVOURS} and runs ./gradlew assemble${flavour} for each flavour, publishing the same artifact paths. In the lint stage add a lint job that runs ./gradlew lint${flavour} for each flavour with the same artifacts. In the test stage add a unitTest job that runs ./gradlew test${flavour}UnitTest for each flavour, and an instrumentationTest job (tagged kvm and vmx) that creates an AVD named test via avdmanager, starts the emulator, waits for it, then runs ./gradlew grantPermission${flavour} connected${flavour}AndroidTest for each flavour, also storing the same artifacts.
